creator: freebsd@simweb.ch
text:
The dependencies are one issue, however (for me) it did not write a PID number in the file it was supposed to do so. Starting the agent as daemon is then possible, but we can't make a rc script since rc can't look up the process ID it was launched under.

There is a proposed patch (by me) to update to the latest version of the FusionInventory Agent that has the fixed dependency included. (PR 204632)

-- Mathieu
